daily_observances.benefit: Removal of obstacles (Vighnaharta)

daily_observances.benefit: Protection from toxins, serpents, and hidden enemies

daily_observances.benefit: Victory of Dharma and divine protection

daily_observances.benefit: Success in directions and vehicle-related prosperity

daily_observances.name: Ekadashi Vrata
daily_observances.benefit: Moksha (Liberation) and extreme mental peace

festivals.name: Narasimha Jayanti
festivals.observance_note: Exception: Standard Shukla Tithi 14 falls on 2026-04-30 at sunrise, but due to tradition/ritual requiring pradosha presence, it is celebrated on 2026-04-29.
